sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 21:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 21:1
items.html: “He” indicates the light in Ein Sof. “His name” indicates the will to receive in Ein Sof, called Malchut of Ein Sof. “One” indicates that no disparity of form whatsoever is detected there between the light, which is “He,” and the vessel, which is “His Name.” Rather, it is all light. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 30 and Inner Observation, item 13)
